use std::fs;
use std::path::Path;

#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
pub enum ConfigError {
    #[error("failed to read config: {0}")]
    Io(#[from] std::io::Error),
    #[error("invalid config format: {0}")]
    Parse(#[from] toml::de::Error),
    #[error("missing required field: {0}")]
    MissingField(String),
}

pub struct Config {
    pub database_url: String,
    pub max_connections: u32,
}

pub fn load_config(path: &Path) -> Result<Config, ConfigError> {
    let contents = fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let parsed: toml::Value = toml::from_str(&contents)?;
    let url = parsed["database"]["url"]
        .as_str()
        .ok_or_else(|| ConfigError::MissingField("database.url".into()))?
        .to_string();
    let max_conn = parsed["database"]["max_connections"]
        .as_integer()
        .ok_or_else(|| ConfigError::MissingField("max_connections".into()))? as u32;
    Ok(Config {
        database_url: url,
        max_connections: max_conn,
    })
}

pub fn init_logger() -> Result<(), tracing_subscriber::util::TryInitError> {
    tracing_subscriber::fmt()
        .with_env_filter("info")
        .try_init()
}
